[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001011 5
1 11110000 4
2 00101000 2
3 10011001 4
4 01011111 6
5 11001011 5
6 10001010 3
7 01111000 4

01 10 01010000 2
12 21 00010000 1
23 32 00011101 4
34 43 01001011 4
45 54 10001010 3 match 6
56 65 00001000 1
67 76 00000000 a
70 07 00000000 a

02 20 00011000 2
13 31 01010000 2
24 42 00001001 2
35 53 00001010 2
46 64 01001000 2
57 75 10000000 1
60 06 01111000 4 match 7
71 17 00000000 a

03 30 01011010 4
14 41 01000000 1
25 52 00001000 1
36 63 01011000 3
47 74 10000000 1
50 05 00001010 2
61 16 01010000 2
72 27 00000100 1

04 40 01001010 3
15 51 00000000 a
26 62 00011000 2
37 73 00000100 1
